name: Change Risk Recommender (FSI Brazil)
businessOutcome: Cut CAB review time on Normal changes in a tier-1 Brazilian bank by surfacing a transparent risk score and rationale, with zero auto-approve on high-risk items and a written audit trail aligned to BACEN.
serviceNowSurface: Now Assist Change Risk Recommendation, with a custom display panel inside the change form showing rationale and history
role: Augments the change manager with a model-grounded risk recommendation plus a plain-language rationale, never deciding autonomously on high-risk or BACEN-bound CIs.
responsibilities: Score each Normal change with a risk band (low, medium, high) and a confidence
Cite up to three historical changes that informed the score
Surface the active blackout window and any conflict with PIX or BACEN cycles
Display structured override field; reject free-text overrides
outputs: top three similar past changes with outcome
override field with required structured fields
mustNotDo: Auto-approve any change touching a CI marked BACEN-critical
Allow free-text override; only structured-field override accepted
Send recommendations outside the CAB without approval
approvalGates: Manual approval mandatory for high-risk band, no exception
Risk Reviewer sign-off on Risk Conditions changes
Platform Owner sign-off before promoting from shadow mode to active
auditRequirements: sn_aia_execution_* records reconciled against change_request weekly
Override events logged with structured justification, retrievable in 24 hours per BACEN 4.893
Quarterly review of override rate; if above 15 percent, halt active mode and review
rollbackPlan: Revert to manual change risk via a single configuration toggle. Preserve the last 90 days of recommendations for audit. If the issue is on the Risk Conditions revision, revert the update set and run regression on the next CAB cycle.
tests: Synthetic change matching a historical incident-causing pattern surfaces high-risk band
Change inside a blackout window blocks auto-approve regardless of band
Free-text override attempt rejected by UI policy
Override rate stays below 15 percent in a 60-change shadow set
Audit retrieval rehearsal completes within 24 hours
